## Test plan

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `go build ./...`
- [ ] If desk touched: `cd apps/desk && npm run typecheck && npm run build`
- [ ] If docs touched: `cd apps/docs && npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (or explained why not needed)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or private keys committed
- [ ] Breaking changes called out explicitly
